emails.subject: Re: Allocation Exceptions
emails.body: Re: Allocation Exceptions Daren Meters 3002 and 3003 have volume from Jan 99 thru the current month. Could a deal be created for these volumes? There is a substanital amount of volume each month. Aimee Forwarded by Aimee Lannou/HOU/ECT on 02/16/2000 02:54 PM Fred Boas 02/13/2000 02:28 PM
